column1: # Source of truth for myfinance schema mapping.
#   commands/sync.md                 (schema list shown when no filename is given)
# Columns (TAB-separated, blank lines and lines starting with `#` are skipped):
#   3. codegen_script    npm script in ui-myfinance/package.json (without `npm run` prefix)
#   4. generated_client  Path under ui-myfinance/src/auto/api/ that codegen_script writes (the
#                        `-n <name>` argument of that script) — used to scope-check that a sync
#                        only touched its own generated client, not another schema's.
# Adding a new schema is just a new row here.
